# Beudox HR - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Project Overview
Beudox HR is a comprehensive Human Resources Management System built with React, TypeScript, and Supabase. It provides complete HR functionality including employee management, payroll, evaluations, leave tracking, and organizational workflows.

## Architecture & Technology Stack

### Frontend Architecture
- **Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript
- **Build Tool**: Vite with SWC compiler
- **Routing**: React Router v6 with protected routes
- **State Management**: React Query (TanStack Query) for server state
- **UI Framework**: Shadcn/ui built on Radix UI primitives
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens
- **Forms**: React Hook Form with Zod validation
- **Charts**: Recharts for data visualization
- **Rich Text**: TipTap editor for policy documents

### Backend Architecture
- **Database**: PostgreSQL via Supabase
- **Authentication**: Supabase Auth with Row Level Security (RLS)
- **API**: Supabase client with real-time subscriptions
- **Edge Functions**: Supabase Edge Functions for server-side logic
- **File Storage**: Supabase Storage for documents and images

### Key Design Patterns
- **Component Composition**: Extensive use of compound components
- **Custom Hooks**: Business logic abstracted into reusable hooks
- **Provider Pattern**: Context providers for global state (Auth, Theme)
- **Compound Components**: UI components with sub-components (Dialog, Form, etc.)
- **Render Props**: Flexible component APIs

## Database Schema Overview

### Core Tables
- **companies**: Organization information
- **employees**: Employee profiles and basic info
- **employee_roles**: Role assignments with permissions
- **roles**: Available roles and permissions
- **departments**: Organizational structure

### HR Management
- **evaluations**: Quarterly performance reviews
- **daily_evaluations**: Daily feedback and ratings
- **leave_requests**: Leave applications and approvals
- **leave_balances**: Employee leave entitlements
- **leave_types**: Configurable leave categories

### Financial
- **payroll_records**: Payroll processing and history
- **monthly_expenses**: Company expense tracking
- **loans**: Employee loan management
- **invoices**: Client invoicing system

### Projects & Operations
- **projects**: Project management
- **clients**: Client relationship management
- **hr_policies**: Policy documents
- **public_holidays**: Holiday calendar

## Authentication & Authorization

### Role-Based Access Control
- **CEO**: Full system access
- **HR Manager**: HR operations, employee management
- **Team Lead**: Team oversight, evaluations
- **Employee**: Personal data access

### Security Features
- Row Level Security (RLS) on all tables
- JWT-based authentication
- Secure password reset flows
- API key management for integrations

## Key Components & Patterns

### Layout System
- **AppLayout**: Main application shell with sidebar and topbar
- **AppSidebar**: Collapsible navigation with role-based menu items
- **TopBar**: Page headers with breadcrumbs
- **ProtectedRoute**: Route wrapper with authentication checks

### Form Components
- Extensive use of react-hook-form with Zod schemas
- Custom form fields with validation
- File upload components with drag-and-drop
- Rich text editors for policy documents

### Data Fetching
- React Query for caching and synchronization
- Optimistic updates for better UX
- Real-time subscriptions for live data
- Error boundaries and loading states

### UI Components
- Comprehensive component library based on Radix UI
- Custom design tokens and theming
- Responsive design with mobile-first approach
- Accessibility-first development

## Development Workflow

### Code Organization
- Feature-based folder structure
- Shared utilities in `lib/` directory
- Type definitions in `types/` directory
- Custom hooks in `hooks/` directory

### Build & Deployment
- Vite for fast development and optimized builds
- TypeScript for type safety
- ESLint for code quality
- Vitest for unit testing
- Playwright for E2E testing

## Common Patterns & Conventions

### Naming Conventions
- PascalCase for components and types
- camelCase for variables and functions
- kebab-case for CSS classes and files
- UPPER_SNAKE_CASE for constants

### File Structure
- Components grouped by feature/domain
- Utility functions in dedicated modules
- Types co-located with related components
- Tests alongside implementation files

### State Management
- Local state with useState/useReducer
- Server state with React Query
- Global state with Context (Auth, Theme)
- Form state with react-hook-form

## Performance Considerations

### Optimization Techniques
- Code splitting with dynamic imports
- Image optimization and lazy loading
- Virtualization for large lists
- Memoization with useMemo/useCallback
- Bundle analysis and tree shaking

### Database Optimization
- Efficient queries with proper indexing
- Pagination for large datasets
- Real-time subscriptions for live updates
- Caching strategies with React Query

## Integration Points

### External Services
- Supabase for backend services
- Email services via Supabase Edge Functions
- File storage and CDN
- PDF generation for reports

### API Patterns
- RESTful endpoints via Supabase
- GraphQL-like queries with Supabase client
- Real-time subscriptions
- File upload and management

## Testing Strategy

### Testing Pyramid
- Unit tests for utilities and hooks
- Integration tests for components
- E2E tests for critical user flows
- Visual regression testing

### Testing Tools
- Vitest for fast unit testing
- React Testing Library for component testing
- Playwright for E2E testing
- MSW for API mocking

## Deployment & DevOps

### Build Pipeline
- Automated testing on commits
- Type checking and linting
- Bundle size monitoring
- Performance budgets

### Environment Management
- Environment-specific configurations
- Secret management with Supabase
- Database migrations and seeding
- Backup and recovery procedures
